body: The Shaka Wear blank is no joke. 7.5oz, boxy, sits like a heavyweight vintage tee. Print is crisp — my comment looks exactly like the mockup. Never buying thin tees again.
Fabric feels premium and structured, not floppy. The oversized drape is perfect over cargos. Got 3 comments about it the first day.
Ordered a custom comment for my group chat. The handle formatting is dead-on Instagram. Heavyweight Shaka fabric holds the print beautifully after 4 washes.
Runs boxy and heavy like they say — size down if you don't want oversized. Quality of the Max Heavyweight blank is genuinely excellent for the price.
The 300 DPI print is razor sharp — you can read every letter of the comment across the room. Shaka Wear fabric is thick and structured. Obsessed.
Production took 4 business days exactly like the site said, then tracking updated. No surprises. The tee itself is a tank — proper heavyweight streetwear weight.
Bought two. The bone colorway with a black comment print is unreal. Shaka Wear feel is dense and premium, hem sits perfectly boxy.
Great heavyweight fabric and the comment layout is convincing. Only wish there were more blank colors. Print quality itself is flawless.
